steps.title: What Is a Passed Pawn?
steps.text: A passed pawn has no enemy pawn in front of it or on either adjacent file — nothing can stop it from promoting except a piece. Passed pawns are enormous assets in the endgame. The phrase 'a passed pawn must be pushed' is a Nimzowitsch-ism for a reason.

steps.hint: e5 — one step closer to promotion.

steps.title: Support It!
steps.text: A lone passed pawn still needs help. Without a king escorting it forward, a single enemy piece can stop it. Activate your king to support the advance — and create a new queen.
